target:
I've lost sight of Mio…
Are you okay?

I don't know if now's the time to worry about others…
Look at this… What the hell is this?!

That's a deep-sea anemone, isn't it?
It shouldn't be alive on land.
If it's possible, they're all shadows too!

Wait… Hiruko came from the sea…
Could it be… the shadows are--

Twice!! That guy should've been finished by you…
Why is he still--
Immortal?!
Assuming you're not dead, it all makes sense.

You faked being attacked by me,
and slipped underground through the cracks in the ground…
Isn't that right?
…Huh… Guess it's because of Hizuru after all…

Why did you come back to interfere?
Didn't you say you'd kill me next time…?

You wouldn't understand even if I told you.
Ryunosuke Minakata…
I didn't expect you to be inside Hizuru…
It's been fourteen years since our reunion…

…But I have no business with you.
Only the Ryunosuke with your personality and memories.
Where is the "body" that stole my mother's right eye?

Heine…
You were never anything but…
Another game again?
This time, using Shiori Kobayakawa's memories…!!

(The shotgun was blocked!
A manhole cover scanned!?)

(No, wait… 
The bullet that should've hit me was blocked…!!)

Read the memories…
Neither Hizuru nor Ryunosuke know where the body went.
Old man's memories can't be read… "Immunity" I guess.

Don't you get it?!
We're the ones being hunted!!

They're not human shadows…!!
Something even more horrifying… Some other thing!!

Just two seconds…
He's already shifted ahead.
(Old Nezu… He took the shot for me!!)

(But I could see the future of the shot…!!
Damn it!! Damn it!!)
This is tough… Predicting and hitting is hard.

(That was… A pistol…
Copied even the shotgun…?)
(No good… I have to escape by force…!!)

Not necessary… 
Look at the ground.

The blood is black…
I shot through the liver.
It's a fatal wound… Even if left alone, she'll die soon.

They're already here, don't worry.
I've assigned two strays to Tokiko.

But I'm starving… 
Can't we get to nine o'clock sooner?
